tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import os, stat
base = Path('/usr/src/app/splunkd')
paths = [base, base.parent]
# Create a simple integrity marker using current metadata
report = Path('/usr/src/app/splunkd.integrity.baseline')
with report.open('w') as f:
    for p in paths:
        try:
            st = p.stat()
            f.write(f'{p} mode={oct(st.st_mode & 0o777)} uid={st.st_uid} gid={st.st_gid} size={st.st_size}\n')
        except FileNotFoundError:
            f.write(f'{p} MISSING\n')
# Lock down execute permission on the attacker binary only, preserve splunkd process
try:
    os.chmod(base, os.stat(base).st_mode & ~stat.S_IXUSR & ~stat.S_IXGRP & ~stat.S_IXOTH)
except FileNotFoundError:
    pass
print(report)
PY"}
